overall.description: A first-person exploration of a rustic wooden frontier town at night during a rainstorm. The player character walks through the muddy settlement, examines a trading post, and ascends to an elevated walkway overlooking the torch-lit village.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town street with two-story log cabin

agents.ego_description: walking past a two-story log cabin on the right while observing the stormy surroundings

entered.detail: two-story log cabin with upper balcony and external wooden stairs
tall pine trees surrounding the settlement
muddy dirt ground with patches of grass and puddles from rain
wooden fence lining the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy night in a frontier town, with the player walking past a large two-story log cabin with an upper balcony. The surroundings are dark and rainy, with dense forest visible in the background and muddy ground underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: trading post approach with muddy paths

events.description: moving from the large log cabin area toward a smaller trading post building
approaching a warm lantern illuminating the trading post porch

agents.ego_description: walking toward a trading post building with a glowing porch lantern

entered.detail: single-story log building with Trade Goods sign painted on the exterior
lit lantern hanging above the entrance casting warm light
wooden bench sitting on the porch

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the rainy frontier town toward a trading post building. A warm lantern glows on the porch, illuminating a wooden bench and barrel near the entrance. The ground is muddy from the ongoing rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: trading post exterior window and rear stairway

events.description: peering through the window to observe the cluttered interior with shelves and furniture
moving from the front porch to the rear walkway and ascending covered stairs

agents.ego_description: examining the trading post interior through the window before moving to the rear stairs

entered.detail: multi-paned window showing interior with various goods
wooden shelves visible inside the building holding merchandise
covered wooden stairway leading upward between building walls
stack of sandbags on the rear walkway
loose wooden planks leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the trading post window and peers inside at the cluttered interior with shelves and goods. Moving around the building, the player passes sandbags and wooden planks to reach a covered stairway leading upward.

events.description: exiting the covered stairway onto an elevated walkway with panoramic view of the village
observing the torch-lit buildings spread across the valley below

agents.ego_description: standing on an elevated walkway surveying the torch-lit frontier town and surrounding forest

entered.detail: wooden walkway with railings extending along the hillside
wooden railings along the walkway edge
panoramic view of the frontier settlement with multiple lit buildings
dense pine forest surrounding the village on all sides

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an elevated wooden walkway overlooking the entire frontier settlement. Multiple log buildings with warm lights glow in the stormy darkness below, surrounded by dense forest. The camera pans across the panoramic view of the torch-lit village nestled in the valley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked frontier town that ascends from the muddy ground to a panoramic overlook. It begins by passing a large two-story log cabin under a stormy night sky, moving through the dark, rainy settlement with a dense forest looming in the background. As the camera advances, the gloom gives way to the warm glow of a lantern on the porch of a trading post, where the path leads past a wooden bench and barrels toward a cluttered shop window. The movement then shifts around the building's exterior, passing sandbags and planks before climbing a covered stairway. Finally, the camera emerges onto an elevated wooden walkway, opening up to a wide view of the torch-lit village and its glowing log buildings nestled within the valley.
